recent_projects.name: ayechat-dev
recent_projects.summary: Aye Chat: Terminal-first AI Code Generator

recent_projects.name: better-confluence-mcp
recent_projects.summary: MCP server for Confluence with local filesystem caching. Sync spaces locally, edit HTML files, and push changes back. Features: tree-based storage, incremental sync, version conflict detection, auto full-sync every 3 days.
